# Test video-list command validation
# The video-list command lists all video overviews for a notebook with status
# Requires: <notebook-id>

# === VIDEO-LIST COMMAND ===
# Test video-list without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test video-list
stderr 'usage: nlm video-list <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test video-list with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test video-list notebook123 extra
stderr 'usage: nlm video-list <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test video-list without authentication (should fail)
! exec ./nlm_test video-list notebook123
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'
